---
title: "Integration & Machine Learning"
description: "MOFA2/DIABLO multi-omics integration combined with XGBoost + SHAP
  predictive modeling, VAE benchmarking, and LLM-based interpretation."
date: 2026-06-10
image: "/images/Phase 5.png"

---

## Overview

Unified phase combining unsupervised multi-omics factor analysis (MOFA2,
DIABLO) with supervised machine learning (XGBoost + SHAP), a VAE benchmark
(expected to underperform classical methods at small N), and an LLM-based
PubMed RAG interpretation agent.

**Timeline:** Weeks 9–15

## Part A: Multi-Omics Factor Analysis

*Coming soon.*

## Part B: Supervised ML & AI Interpretation

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
